CustomField.description: Auto-calculated. This is the resale HUD AMI for the AMI record selected in the Resale - AMI field, weighted for family size.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated. This is the resale HUD AMI for the AMI record selected in the Resale - AMI field, weighted for family size.
CustomField.label: Resale - AMI for Household Size
